fields.description: The user this event belongs to.
fields.label: User

fields.description: Indicates whether the event is a draft and not yet finalized or sent.
fields.label: Draft

fields.description: The server-assigned unique identifier of the event.
fields.label: ID

fields.description: The calendars to which this event belongs.
fields.label: Calendars

fields.description: Indicates whether this event is the original source event created by the organizer.
fields.label: Origin

fields.description: Indicates whether the organizer may add themselves as a participant.
fields.label: May Invite Self

fields.description: Indicates whether the organizer is allowed to invite additional participants.
fields.label: May Invite Others

fields.description: Indicates whether the attendee list should be hidden from other participants.
fields.label: Hide Attendees

fields.description: A short, human-readable summary of the event.
fields.label: Title

fields.description: The time zone in which the event start time is defined.
fields.label: Time Zone

fields.description: Additional free-text details about the event.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: Identifies the principal responsible for the event.
fields.label: Organizer

fields.description: The overall status of the event.
fields.label: Status

fields.description: The length of the event expressed as a duration (e.g., PT30M, P1D).
fields.label: Duration

fields.description: Indicates how the event affects the organizer’s availability.
fields.label: Free Busy Status

fields.description: A monotonically increasing number representing the version of the event.
fields.label: Sequence

fields.description: The start date-time of the event.
fields.label: Start

fields.description: A globally unique identifier for the event.
fields.label: UID

fields.description: The physical or virtual locations where the event takes place.
fields.label: Locations

fields.description: The people or entities involved in the event.
fields.label: Participants

fields.description: Indicates whether the event is displayed without a specific start time.
fields.label: Show Without Time

fields.description:
Defines how the event repeats over time.

Example: 
{
  "frequency": "yearly", 
  /*
    REQUIRED.
    Allowed values:
      "yearly", "monthly", "weekly", "daily",
      "hourly", "minutely", "secondly"
  */

  "interval": 1,
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Integer ≥ 1.
    Repeats every N units of `frequency`.
  */

  "count": 10,
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Integer ≥ 1.
    Number of total occurrences.
    MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with `until`.
  */

  "until": "2026-12-31T23:59:59Z",
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    UTC date-time only (RFC 3339).
    MUTUALLY EXCLUSIVE with `count`.
  */

  "firstDayOfWeek": "mo",
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Allowed values:
      "mo", "tu", "we", "th", "fr", "sa", "su"
  */

  "bySecond": [0, 30],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Each value: 0–60
  */

  "byMinute": [0, 15, 30, 45],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Each value: 0–59
  */

  "byHour": [9, 12, 18],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Each value: 0–23
  */

  "byDay": [
    "mo",
    "we",
    "fr",
    "1mo",
    "-1fr"
  ],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Allowed values:
      "mo"  – Monday
      "tu"  – Tuesday
      "we"  – Wednesday
      "th"  – Thursday
      "fr"  – Friday
      "sa"  – Saturday
      "su"  – Sunday

    Positional weekdays (monthly/yearly only):
      "1mo"   → first Monday
      "2tu"   → second Tuesday
      "-1fr"  → last Friday
  */

  "byMonthDay": [1, 15, -1],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Values:
      1–31   → day of month
      -1     → last day of month
      -2     → second-to-last day
  */

  "byYearDay": [1, 100, -1],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Values:
      1–366  → day of year
      -1     → last day of year
  */

  "byWeekNo": [1, 26, 52, -1],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    ISO week numbers.
    Values:
      1–53
      -1 → last week of year
    VALID ONLY when frequency = "yearly"
  */

  "byMonth": [1, 6, 12],
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Values:
      1  → January
      6  → June
      12 → December
  */

  "bySetPosition": [1, -1]
  /*
    OPTIONAL.
    Selects specific occurrences AFTER all other rules are applied.
    Values:
      Positive → nth occurrence
      Negative → nth-from-last occurrence
  */
}
fields.label: Recurrence Rule

fields.description: Reminders or notifications associated with the event.
fields.label: Alerts

fields.description: Indicates whether scheduling messages (invitations, updates, cancellations) should be sent when the event changes.
fields.label: Send Scheduling Messages

fields.description: The UTC timestamp when the event was created.
fields.label: Created (UTC)

fields.description: The UTC timestamp of the most recent modification to the event.
fields.label: Updated (UTC)

fields.description: Indicates whether calendar-level default alerts should be applied.
fields.label: Use Default Alerts

fields.description: Links to external resources associated with the event.
fields.label: Links

fields.description: Controls the visibility of event details to users who have access to the calendar.
fields.label: Privacy
